project.name: Thornfield Manor
project.description: Luxury boutique hotel website — 12 rooms, restaurant, spa, private gardens. Cotswolds, England. Tone: refined and understated, English country house elegance.

canvas.reference: MacBook Air M4 — 16% margin chosen for editorial/luxury intent per layout.md guidance. 1470 − (2 × 235) = 1000px content area.

color.mood: refined, understated, warm stone — quiet luxury
color.rationale: Hue 38° = warm sand/stone, evoking Cotswolds limestone. Saturation 18% = low, preventing garish warmth. All vitality comes from texture and proportion, not colour intensity.

near.role: warm gold — decorative rule lines, hover accents

sage.role: muted sage green — primary interactive colour, accent, CTA

steel.role: muted steel — deep dark sections, footer, hero overlay

dominant.note: Using effective near-white 97 for primary background; closest bracketed shade is 94. The cream warmth of shade 94 is used for secondary surfaces.

structural.usage: body text, borders, dividers, dark UI elements

primary.usage: interactive elements, sage green brand colour

accent.usage: CTAs, key highlight lines, focus states

typography.rationale: Both faces are Old-style serifs evoking English printing tradition. Cormorant Garamond has extreme contrast and elegance for headlines; EB Garamond has warmer, more bookish body texture. Neither face should be substituted with a sans-serif — the serif character is essential to the tone.

hero.usage: Hero section main headline only. Light weight prevents heaviness against photographic backgrounds.

heading.usage: Page section headings: Rooms, Restaurant, Spa, Location, Testimonials.

section.usage: Sub-section headings, room names in detail view, menu section titles.

subheading.usage: Room card names, restaurant dish names, spa treatment names.

price.usage: Room pricing, menu item prices. Light weight keeps price secondary to experience copy.

body.usage: All body copy paragraphs. Room descriptions, restaurant copy, spa copy, hero subheadline.

body-small.usage: Secondary descriptions, nav link text, footer paragraph text, card supplementary copy.

label.usage: Category labels (ROOMS, SPA, DINING), room amenity pills, form field labels, nav eyebrows.

caption.usage: Image captions, footnotes, copyright, fine print.

typography.notes: Using 9 sizes from scale. 11 chosen over 12 — Cormorant Garamond's fine strokes render clearly at 11px on Retina. Gaps in scale: 10 fills 8–13 gap; 18 fills 16–21 gap per gap-fill rule (16 + F2 of 16-ruler = 16 + 2 = 18 — confirmed valid). Price role shares 21px with section role but differs in weight and variant.

spacing.gutterRationale: 40px gutter chosen so card padding (32px) < gutter (40px) — satisfying Gestalt proximity rule. 40 = 5×8, on grid.
spacing.gestaltCheck: card-padding (32) < gutter (40) ✓ | item-to-item (32) < group-to-group (64) ✓ | group-to-group (64) < section-to-section (128) ✓ | label-to-field (8) < item-to-item (32) ✓

sections.name: nav
sections.heightMath: Inside-Out: nav link font 13px, lineHeight 24px. Padding top + bottom: 24px each. Height = 24 + 24 + 24 = 72px. On 8px grid ✓
sections.columns: two-zone: logo left, nav links + CTA right
sections.scrollBehavior: Transparent over hero image; transitions to bg-primary at 80px scroll

sections.name: hero
sections.heightMath: Outside-In from canvas width: 1470 × 58% = 852.6 → rounded to 856px (nearest 8). 58% gives a tall, immersive image — appropriate for luxury hotel first impression.

imageRatio.description: Full-bleed landscape photograph of Thornfield Manor exterior or gardens at dusk
imageRatio.overlay: linear gradient from steel-6 at 58% opacity at bottom to transparent at top

sections.contentPosition: bottom-left, above gradient, within content area margins

headline.text:
A Manor for the
Thoughtful Traveller

subheadline.text: Twelve rooms. Private gardens. A kitchen guided by the seasons.

body.text: Each room is individually appointed, drawing on the manor's history and the landscape beyond.

sections.name: room-detail
sections.note: This is a page-level template, not a homepage section. Used for individual room pages.

body.text: All rates include breakfast for two and use of spa facilities.
A kitchen that follows the Cotswolds season. Guests are seated once each evening, at a time of their choosing.

image.description: Kitchen interior or hero dish photography
Dining room set for evening service

body.text: Restored outbuildings housing a thermal suite, treatment rooms, and a 14-metre indoor pool fed from a natural spring.

panoramicImage.description: Aerial or long-lens view of Thornfield Manor estate and grounds

sections.name: testimonials
sections.type: content-area — centered single column with navigation

quoteText.example: An utterly remarkable stay — the kind of place that makes you forget the world exists.

backgroundImage.description: Subtle texture — linen or stone — at low opacity overlay

body.text: We welcome enquiries by telephone or email. For immediate availability, please use the booking form.

tagline.text: A country house hotel in the heart of the Cotswolds.

button-ghost-dark.usage: CTA buttons on dark sections (hero, spa, booking)

divider-rule.usage: Between content sections within a column. Not between page sections.

gold-accent-rule.usage: Decorative short rule under eyebrow labels in testimonials and hero. Never full-width.

hero-full-bleed.description: Tall immersive landscape — hero section. Signals presence and grandeur.

panoramic-estate.description: Wide cinematic strip for grounds/location. Estate photography.

portrait-room.description: Portrait-tendency landscape for room photography. Shows bed, window, furnishings.

restaurant-feature.description: Tall landscape for restaurant/spa feature blocks. More immersive than 68%.

spa-card.description: Balanced landscape for spa treatment cards.

images.description: Thornfield Manor exterior — dusk light, warm stone facade, gardens in foreground
Individual room photography — each card shows a unique room
Full room shot — bed, windows, key furnishings
Detail shots — bathroom, window seat, fireplace
Kitchen interior or seasonal dish plate
Dining room laid for evening service
Spa treatment rooms, pool, thermal suite
Aerial or telephoto estate view — manor in landscape context

darkLightMap.note: Transitions to transparent over hero on scroll

darkLightMap.bgColor: photography + gradient overlay hsl(189,12%,6%) at 58% opacity bottom

interactiveInventory.element: Nav — Rooms, Dining, Spa, Grounds, About, Enquire links
interactiveInventory.note: Full nav height (72px) is the tap target. fontSize 13 ≥ 13px minimum ✓
Height 40px ≥ 32px minimum ✓. Label at 11px uppercase with tracking is legible.
Tap target padded to 32px minimum using padding-block

interactiveInventory.element: Rooms overview — View all twelve rooms

interactiveInventory.note: 40×40 circular button. Arrow glyph at 16px ≥ 13px minimum ✓
Footer links have 12px padding-block each, producing 12+24+12=48... recalculate: line-height 24px + 8px padding top + 8px bottom = 40px tap target ✓

contentVerification.maxContent: A Manor for the Thoughtful Traveller
contentVerification.estimatedWidth: Line 1: 'A Manor for the' = 15 chars × ~32px = 480px. Line 2: 'Thoughtful Traveller' = 20 chars × ~32px = 640px.
contentVerification.note: Set to max-width 640px with line breaks managed by content. Both lines comfortably within 640px at 55px. ✓

6 nav items. Widest ~160px. Logo ~200px. CTA button ~160px. Total ~1320px. Content area 1000px — TOO WIDE. Fix: Use 'Dining' instead of 'Restaurant & Bar' (6 chars). Revised items: Rooms, Dining, Spa, Grounds, About, Enquire. Widest = 'Grounds' = 7 chars × 8px + 32px padding = 88px. 6 items × ~88px = 528px + logo 200px + CTA 160px + gaps = ~960px. Fits within 1000px ✓
220px well within 307px card width (no horizontal padding on content at card level). ✓

247px within 307px. Note: price and 'View Room →' share a row (flex space-between). Price ~247px + gap + link ~90px = 337px. OVERFLOW on 307px card. Fix: stack price above link, do not share a row. Adjusted: price on its own line, 'View Room →' on next line. 247px within 307px ✓
'The Thornfield Suite' at 18px is ~220px wide in a 172px usable area. Wraps to 2 lines. Acceptable for a card name — 2-line heading is readable. Confirmed acceptable. ✓
Currency value is short. Even a max of '£1,250' = 6 chars × 13px = 78px. Well within 172px ✓

contentVerification.element: Room detail — right column body text
contentVerification.note: 41 chars per line at 16px is excellent readability (optimal 45-75 for body text — slightly tight but acceptable for a narrower column). ✓

contentVerification.maxContent: An utterly remarkable stay — the kind of place that makes you forget the world exists.
contentVerification.note: 89 chars ÷ 49 per line = ~2 lines. Fine at 21px italic in a 640px centred column. ✓

gestaltVerification.note: 32px internal < 40px gutter ✓. 24px pricing card padding < 40px gutter ✓. Chosen gutter 40px specifically to satisfy this rule.

gestaltVerification.level: section-header to grid vs section padding
testimonial — quote to attribution vs attribution to navigation
room detail — amenity list item gap vs amenities block to CTA
nav item padding vs logo-to-links gap
gestaltVerification.external: nav splits into two zones across 1000px — no explicit gap needed; space-between achieves separation
gestaltVerification.note: Space-between layout; visual separation from distance, not gap value. Acceptable for nav.

gestaltVerification.level: footer column internal gap vs footer paddingTop
